description: Calculate the Modified Bare Soil Index (BSI) and a high-risk soil mask from the Landsat image at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The BSI band must use the formula ((SWIR1 + Red) - (NIR + Green)) / ((SWIR1 + Red) + (NIR + Green)), where SWIR1 is band_1, NIR is band_2, Red is band_3, and Green is band_4. The 'high_erosion_risk' band must be a binary mask for pixels where BSI is greater than 0.10. Save the resulting product to ~/snap_exports/erosion_risk.dim in BEAM-DIMAP format and export it to ~/snap_exports/erosion_risk.tif as a GeoTIFF.
